title: Structured JSON request logging via Pino (one line per request)
description: Coord coord-ac249ad6. Goal: Every API request emits exactly one structured JSON log line via Pino. Required fields: method, path, status, durationMs, requestId. Constraints: use Pino; emit exactly one log line per request. Non-goals: no body logging, no header logging. Success: exactly one valid JSON line per request with all required fields; unique requestId per request; automated test coverage via node --test.

title: Add Pino request-logging middleware to app.js
description:
<!-- tracker:plan-backref:start -->
Step 1 of plan pl-3b02.

Parent seed: dog-food-a23e — Structured JSON request logging via Pino (one line per request)
Plan template: feature
Plan approach: Add a single Pino-backed request-logging middleware mounted at the top of the Express stack in app.js, right after express.json() and before any route. The middleware will: (1) assign a requestId per request using crypto.randomUUID()…

Run `tracker plan show pl-3b02` for the full plan (context, alternatives, sibling steps, acceptance criteria).
<!-- tracker:plan-backref:end -->
